experiment: T3 iter54 DANN + Tier-2 — goal-v1 slot T3-F

formula.experiment: T3 iter54 DANN + Tier-2 PCA whitening — goal-v1 slot T3-F
formula.stage1: Ridge alpha=1.0 on H&Y + cv_yrs + cv_sex + cv_dbs (unchanged from iter47)
formula.tier2_pca: PD-only PCA whitening on outer-train V2 features; K=64
stage2_ensemble: LGB on K=500 LGB-importance-selected V2 features (iter47-branch)
DANN MLP on Tier-2 PCA-whitened features; trunk 64->32; GRL site head
formula.primary_stat: per-subject sign-flip permutation (10000) + BCa CI + +0.025 MCID

leakage_firewall.tier1: Fold-local imputation + Stage-1 Ridge + K=500 importance + PCA basis. No global statistics touch test.
leakage_firewall.tier2_declaration: PCA basis is label-free (no labels in covariance/SVD computation). Manifest in lockbox JSON.
leakage_firewall.site_labels_in_dann: Site labels (NLS/WPD) ARE supervised signal for the ADVERSARIAL branch, but the gradient is REVERSED so the trunk LEARNS TO NOT predict site. This is the canonical DANN setup (Ganin et al.). Not a leakage.
